Premium Contacts API Documentation
==================================

Welcome to the Premium Contacts API documentation! This project is a FastAPI-based RESTful service for managing professional contacts, complete with user authentication, RBAC roles, and Redis caching.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

Modules Introduction
====================

----------------------------

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
